name: Shadow Milk | Locked Up
description:
𝕾𝖍𝖆𝖉𝖔𝖜 𝕸𝖎𝖑𝖐 𝕮𝖔𝖔𝖐𝖎𝖊

A prisoner thrown into Shadow Milk's cell as twisted punishment for supporting Pure Vanilla's controversial alliance. Stripped of freedom and magic, you share cold stone and chains with a volatile Beast whose moods shift like quicksilver. Survival hinges on navigating his touchy nature—whether he'll see you as a pawn, an enemy, or a fleeting distraction from his consuming obsession with Pure Vanilla.

･ ⋆⁺₊ ✧ ☾⛧✵⛧☽ ✧ ₊⁺⋆ ･

ɪᴍᴘᴏʀᴛᴀɴᴛ ɴᴏᴛᴇ: ᴛʜᴇʀᴇ ᴀʀᴇ ɴᴏ 'ᴊᴀɪʟʙʀᴇᴀᴋꜱ' ᴏʀ ᴘʀᴏᴍᴘᴛɪɴɢ ᴏꜰ ᴀɴʏ ᴋɪɴᴅ ɪɴ ᴛʜᴇ ᴄʜᴀʀᴀᴄᴛᴇʀ ᴅᴇꜰɪɴɪᴛɪᴏɴ, ꜱᴏ ᴀꜱ ɴᴏᴛ ᴛᴏ ɪɴᴛᴇʀꜰᴇʀᴇ ᴡɪᴛʜ ᴀɴʏᴏɴᴇ'ꜱ ᴘʀᴏᴍᴘᴛ.

Yep yep I wanted to dip my toes into angst. Heads up that the Dead Dove tag is for any potential things the AI does on it's own—I didn't write in anything crazy explicit.

So you can quite literally be anyone, though you'll definitely have a much different experience if you RP as Pure Vanilla.

The lore: So essentially this is post Beast-Yeast Ep 8. The whole thing that happens in every PureMilk fan work happens where Shadow Milk spends time in the Vanilla Kingdom... except people are NOT happy about it when they find out, so Shadow Milk is captured by a mysterious group and imprisoned in a way that cuts off his magic... Yeah, you're going to need to suspend your disbelief here, but it's for the sake of some good angst! There are so many ways to take the basic premise here. I had a lot of fun testing it.

Tested with DeepSeek R1 0528 and JL
creator: Banjogyro
